name: merge
description: Automates the integration of a completed Step 5 feature branch or specific stable commit from its local worktree into the 'main' worktree, and pushes the result to origin — without spending any LLM reasoning turns. Available as the /merge command inside Pi Coding Agent, or as the standalone ./merge (or bare merge, once the repo root is on $PATH) CLI script from any other shell, including Claude Code's '!' prefix.

examples.desc: Safely verify, merge, and push the current HEAD commit into main.
Verify, merge, and push the specific stable Step 5 commit 638e9b4 into main.

usage.desc: Optional commit hash, branch, or reference to merge (default: HEAD).
